Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I had been refraining from engaging in private correspondence, but I have recently attained permission to do so from Mitsuru-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}I plan to make use of this new responsibility with some regularity.[n]{f 1 5 0}Would you like to walk home together with me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Typing accurately on a small device such as a cellular telephone provides more difficulty than I had anticipated.[n]{f 1 5 0}Perhaps I should undergo special training so that I may learn to type as efficiently as Yukari-san.[n]{f 1 5 0}In any case, would you like to walk home together today as well?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I apologize for the sudden request.[n]{f 1 5 0}I would like to "drop by" somewhere with you today.[n]{f 1 5 0}If this is acceptable, I will meet you by your seat after school so that we may leave together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Did you notice the image? Here it is again: {f 1 3 158}[n]Despite the small number of pixels used and suboptimal resolution of the cell phone screen, it remains clear that the image is depicting a cat. {f 1 3 158}[n]By the way, I would like to go back together today too. Would you please accompany me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I apologize if I'm being a nuisance. {f 1 3 158}[n]However, I hope that you are able to share my fondness for this small image. {f 1 3 158}{f 1 3 158}[n]I continue to find it quite magnificent. {f 1 3 158}{f 1 3 158}{f 1 3 158}[n]Regardless, would you like to go back together today? {f 1 3 158}{f 1 3 158}{f 1 3 158}{f 1 3 158}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I recently underwent maintenance in preparation for the final battle, and I am pleased to report that no abnormalities were found.[n]{f 1 5 0}How about you? How are you doing?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Would you care to go to the rooftop after school?[n]{f 1 5 0}I would like to look out over the ocean with you.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something that I wish to tell you. Will you please listen to what I have to say?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I would really like to walk home with you today.[n]{f 1 5 0}I want to be with you and to stay by your side.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_020_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}There's something I would like to ask of you. Will you please indulge me?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_022_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Are you available after school? There is something I would like to do with you at the dorm. {f 1 3 158}[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_024_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I will be near your desk after school for easy access should you wish to spend time together.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_026_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I would like to be by your side. Is that all right?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_028_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I will see you after school. Please consider walking home with me.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_030_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Apparently, the facility near Port Island Station that shows motion pictures specializes in that singular activity.[n]{f 1 5 0}I have heard that these "movies" are enhanced by the facility's use of large screens and high quality audio.[n]{f 1 5 0}I would like to experience this together with you.[n]{f 1 1}
